meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kits for Freelancers: Scale Your Development
content.seo_description: Stop building from scratch. Learn how to use SaaS starter kits with Antigravity and Claude Code to overcome development bottlenecks and ship faster.
content.answer_block: To scale as a freelancer, stop reinventing the wheel. A SaaS starter kit provides the authentication, billing, and database scaffolding you need out-of-the-box. By leveraging AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can automate the boilerplate and focus entirely on shipping high-value features for your clients.
content.intro:
The screen is blank, the cursor is blinking, and your deadline is looming. You’ve built the same login page, the same Stripe integration, and the same database schema a dozen times. Every hour spent on boilerplate is an hour you aren't billing for high-level architecture or creative problem-solving. You are trapped in the 'manual labor' phase of software development.

But the best engineers don't write code; they orchestrate it. By adopting a modern SaaS starter kit, you transform your workflow from a manual grind into a high-velocity assembly line. With the right AI-driven tools, you can bypass the tedious setup and go straight to the features that move the needle for your clients.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project structure using a battle-tested SaaS template to ensure you have a professional foundation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration, focusing on a clean, scalable folder structure.

steps.title: Automate Authentication Flows
steps.description: Configure secure user management without writing custom auth logic from scratch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up authentication routes and middleware for protected dashboard access using the existing Supabase instance.

steps.title: Integrate Billing Infrastructure
steps.description: Connect your application to Stripe for subscription management and payment processing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook handler and subscription plan selection component for the user dashboard.

steps.title: Build the Database Schema
steps.description: Use AI to define your database models based on your client's specific business logic requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma schema definitions for a SaaS multi-tenant architecture with support for user roles and workspaces.

steps.title: Refine and Ship
steps.description: Perform a final audit of the codebase to ensure code quality and performance optimization before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current project for performance bottlenecks and suggest improvements for faster page loads.

pro_tips: Always use a 'feature-first' folder structure to keep your codebase modular as your client's requirements scale.
Use environment-specific secrets management from day one; never hardcode credentials in your starter kit.
Leverage Claude Code to write unit tests for your API routes immediately after creation to save hours of debugging time.
Document your custom logic within the Antigravity prompt history so you can replicate specific patterns across different client projects.
Keep your dependencies minimal; an over-engineered starter kit is just as slow as building from scratch.
content.next_steps: After completing your first build, deploy your project to Vercel or Railway to test the production environment. Once live, create a template of your own modified starter kit to reuse for future client projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting time on boilerplate and start building apps that define your career. Our community of elite AI builders is waiting to help you scale your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
